channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The 4 Republicans Who Helped Dems Shoot Down the SAVE America Act Again
New '60 Minutes' Boss Vows Editorial Freedom
item.description: The new executive producer of "60 Minutes" told a shaken staff Thursday that the country's top-rated television newsmagazine will never take marching ...

item.title: Trump: Only U.S., China Can Retrieve Iran's Uranium
item.description: President Donald Trump said Thursday that only the United States and China have the capability to retrieve enriched uranium from Iran's deeply buried ...

item.title: Trump Demolishes Hunter, Talarico, and 'Basket-Case' Platner All in One Hilarious Take on '28 Election
